en: But some men came down from Judea and were teaching the brothers, "Unless you are circumcised according to the custom of Moses, you cannot be saved."
zh: 有幾個人從猶太下來，教導弟兄們說：“你們若不照摩西的規例受割禮，就不能得救。”

en: And after Paul and Barnabas had no small dissension and debate with them, Paul and Barnabas and some of the others were appointed to go up to Jerusalem to the apostles and the elders about this question.
zh: 保羅和巴拿巴，與他們大大地爭執辯論起來。大家就派保羅、巴拿巴和他們中間的幾個人，為這個問題上耶路撒冷去見使徒和長老。

en: So, being sent on their way by the church, they passed through both Phoenicia and Samaria, describing in detail the conversion of the Gentiles, and brought great joy to all the brothers.
zh: 於是教會給他們送行，他們就經過腓尼基、撒瑪利亞，述說外族人怎樣歸主的事，使弟兄們大大喜樂。

en: When they came to Jerusalem, they were welcomed by the church and the apostles and the elders, and they declared all that God had done with them.
zh: 到了耶路撒冷，他們受到教會、使徒和長老的接待，就報告 神同他們一起所行的一切。

en: But some believers who belonged to the party of the Pharisees rose up and said, "It is necessary to circumcise them and to order them to keep the law of Moses."
zh: 然而有幾個法利賽派的信徒站起來，說：“我們必須給外族人行割禮，吩咐他們遵守摩西的律法。”

en: The apostles and the elders were gathered together to consider this matter.
zh: 使徒和長老聚集在一起，商議這件事。

en: And after there had been much debate, Peter stood up and said to them, "Brothers, you know that in the early days God made a choice among you, that by my mouth the Gentiles should hear the word of the gospel and believe.
zh: 經過了很多的辯論，彼得站起來對他們說：“弟兄們，你們知道，前些時候 神在你們中間揀選了我，使外族人從我的口中聽見福音的道，而且信了。

en: And God, who knows the heart, bore witness to them, by giving them the Holy Spirit just as he did to us,
zh: 知道人心的 神也為他們作證─賜聖靈給他們，像給我們一樣；

en: and he made no distinction between us and them, having cleansed their hearts by faith.
zh: 而且他待他們和我們沒有分別，因為藉著信，他潔淨了他們的心。

en: Now, therefore, why are you putting God to the test by placing a yoke on the neck of the disciples that neither our fathers nor we have been able to bear?
zh: 現在你們為甚麼試探 神，把我們祖先和我們所不能負的軛，放在門徒的頸上呢？

en: But we believe that we will be saved through the grace of the Lord Jesus, just as they will."
zh: 我們相信，我們得救是藉著主耶穌的恩，和他們也是一樣。”

en: And all the assembly fell silent, and they listened to Barnabas and Paul as they related what signs and wonders God had done through them among the Gentiles.
zh: 大家都靜默無聲，聽巴拿巴和保羅述說 神藉著他們在外族人中所行的神蹟奇事。

en: After they finished speaking, James replied, "Brothers, listen to me.
zh: 他們講完了，雅各說：“弟兄們，請聽我說！

en: Simeon has related how God first visited the Gentiles, to take from them a people for his name.
zh: 剛才西門述說 神當初怎樣關懷外族人，從他們中間揀選了眾人，歸在自己的名下。

en: And with this the words of the prophets agree, just as it is written,
zh: 眾先知的話，也符合這個意思，正如經上所記：

en: "'After this I will return, and I will rebuild the tent of David that has fallen; I will rebuild its ruins, and I will restore it,
zh: ‘此後我要回來， 重建大衛倒塌了的帳幕， 重建它損壞之處， 把它重新豎立起來，

en: that the remnant of mankind may seek the Lord, and all the Gentiles who are called by my name, says the Lord, who makes these things
zh: 使餘下的人， 就是所有稱為我名下的外族人，都尋求主，

en: known from of old.'
zh: 這是自古以來就顯明了這些事的主所說的。’

en: Therefore my judgment is that we should not trouble those of the Gentiles who turn to God,
zh: “所以我認為不可難為這些歸服 神的外族人，

en: but should write to them to abstain from the things polluted by idols, and from sexual immorality, and from what has been strangled, and from blood.
zh: 只要寫信叫他們禁戒偶像的污穢、淫亂，勒死的牲畜和血。

en: For from ancient generations Moses has had in every city those who proclaim him, for he is read every Sabbath in the synagogues."
zh: 因為自古以來，在各城裡都有人宣講摩西的書，每逢安息日，在各會堂裡都有人誦讀。”

en: Then it seemed good to the apostles and the elders, with the whole church, to choose men from among them and send them to Antioch with Paul and Barnabas. They sent Judas called Barsabbas, and Silas, leading men among the brothers,
zh: 當時，使徒、長老和全教會都認為好，就從他們中間選出人來，差他們和保羅、巴拿巴一同到安提阿去，所選的就是別號巴撒巴的猶大和西拉，他們是弟兄中的領袖。

en: with the following letter: "The brothers, both the apostles and the elders, to the brothers who are of the Gentiles in Antioch and Syria and Cilicia, greetings.
zh: 於是寫信給他們帶去，信上說：“使徒和作長老的弟兄們，向安提阿、敘利亞、基利家的外族眾弟兄問安。

en: Since we have heard that some persons have gone out from us and troubled you with words, unsettling your minds, although we gave them no instructions,
zh: 我們聽說有人從我們這裡出去，說了一些話攪擾你們，使你們心裡不安，其實我們並沒有吩咐他們。

en: it has seemed good to us, having come to one accord, to choose men and send them to you with our beloved Barnabas and Paul,
zh: 因此，我們一致同意，選派一些人跟我們親愛的巴拿巴和保羅去見你們，

en: men who have risked their lives for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 這兩個人為了我們主耶穌基督的名，曾經把性命置之度外。

en: We have therefore sent Judas and Silas, who themselves will tell you the same things by word of mouth.
zh: 我們派了猶大和西拉一同去，他們也會親口述說這些事。

en: For it has seemed good to the Holy Spirit and to us to lay on you no greater burden than these requirements:
zh: 聖靈和我們都同意，不把別的重擔加在你們身上，然而有幾件事是重要的，

en: that you abstain from what has been sacrificed to idols, and from blood, and from what has been strangled, and from sexual immorality. If you keep yourselves from these, you will do well. Farewell."
zh: 就是禁戒祭過偶像的食物、血、勒死的牲畜和淫亂。這些事你們若能保守自己不作，那就好了。祝你們平安！”

en: So when they were sent off, they went down to Antioch, and having gathered the congregation together, they delivered the letter.
zh: 他們受了差派，下安提阿去，集合了眾人，就把書信交上。

en: And when they had read it, they rejoiced because of its encouragement.
zh: 眾人讀了，因信上的勸勉，就感到欣慰。

en: And Judas and Silas, who were themselves prophets, encouraged and strengthened the brothers with many words.
zh: 猶大和西拉也是先知，說了許多話勸勉弟兄，堅固他們。

en: And after they had spent some time, they were sent off in peace by the brothers to those who had sent them.
zh: 住了一段時間，弟兄們就給他們送行，祝一路平安；他們就回到差派他們的人那裡去。
保羅和巴拿巴卻住在安提阿，跟許多別的人一同教導，傳講主的道。

en: But Paul and Barnabas remained in Antioch, teaching and preaching the word of the Lord, with many others also.
zh: 過了一些時候，保羅對巴拿巴說：“我們要回到我們傳過主道的各城，探望弟兄們，好知道他們的情形怎麼樣。”

en: And after some days Paul said to Barnabas, "Let us return and visit the brothers in every city where we proclaimed the word of the Lord, and see how they are."
zh: 巴拿巴有意要帶別號馬可的約翰一同去，

en: Now Barnabas wanted to take with them John called Mark.
zh: 但保羅認為不應帶他去，因為他從前在旁非利亞離開過他們，不跟他們一起去作工。

en: But Paul thought best not to take with them one who had withdrawn from them in Pamphylia and had not gone with them to the work.
zh: 他們各持己見，以致彼此分手。巴拿巴帶著馬可，坐船到塞浦路斯去；

en: And there arose a sharp disagreement, so that they separated from each other. Barnabas took Mark with him and sailed away to Cyprus,
zh: 保羅卻選了西拉，眾弟兄把他交託在主的恩典中之後，他就出發了。

en: but Paul chose Silas and departed, having been commended by the brothers to the grace of the Lord.
zh: 他走遍了敘利亞、基利家，堅固眾教會。

en: And he went through Syria and Cilicia, strengthening the churches.
